children.text: Open the app whenever you want, and we'll give you the most important and interesting news from around the global economy.
We can also send you notifications. They're fun, customizable, and won't even buzz your phone most of the time. Is that OK?
Thanks. 👈 You can customize your experience by going to settings, located to the left. Swipe over there any time.
Are you ready to get started?
Alright, let’s get you the latest news…
The head of Uber’s self-driving car division has left his post amid an ongoing legal battle with rival Waymo, the Alphabet-owned company where he used to work.
You can select what alerts you want to receive. We’ll only buzz you when it’s really important; otherwise, your phone will just light up quietly. Enjoy.
Rare. This is the only alert that will buzz your phone.
Once or twice a day. News we think deserves your notice.
At trading day’s end / The bell rings, let’s all go home / Hark! Here’s a poem
A few times daily when there’s a bunch more stuff to read in the app.
Sign up to receive the most important and interesting news from around the world in your inbox.
Links that responsible app creators must include somewhere, and so here they are
Rate us in the Google Play store!
Send feedback or report a bug
